children.heading: High school graduation or equivalent and admission to institution required
children.label: a High school graduation or equivalent and admission to institution required
children.text: Each student awarded a scholarship under this subpart shall be a graduate of a public or private secondary school (or a home school, whether treated as a home school or a private school under State law) or have the equivalent of a certificate of graduation as recognized by the State in which the student resides and must have been admitted for enrollment at an institution of higher education.

children.heading: Selection based on promise of academic achievement
children.label: b Selection based on promise of academic achievement
children.text: Each student awarded a scholarship under this subpart must demonstrate outstanding academic achievement and show promise of continued academic achievement.
